name: Instatic (Postgres)
description: Self-hosted Instatic CMS with managed Postgres. Builds the Docker image from the 0xtsotsi/Instatic fork at branch main.

INSTATIC_REPO.description: Git repository to build the Instatic image from. Default: the 0xtsotsi fork. Override to point at a different fork or branch.

INSTATIC_BRANCH.description: Git branch or tag to build from. Pin a semver tag (e.g. v0.0.11) for predictable upgrades; track main for the latest fork commits.

PORT.description: HTTP port the Bun server listens on. Must match the service target port.

DATABASE_URL.description: Internal Postgres connection string. Resolved by Railway at deploy time.

UPLOADS_DIR.description: Persistent uploads directory (must live on the mounted volume).

STATIC_DIR.description: Built admin SPA directory baked into the image.

INSTATIC_SECRET_KEY.description: Base64 32-byte AES key for encrypted server secrets (AI credentials, MFA TOTP seeds). Generated by Railway at deploy time; copy the value to your password manager after first deploy.

PUBLIC_ORIGIN.description: Public origin(s) trusted by the CSRF check. Default: the auto-assigned Railway domain. Override if you add a custom domain (comma-separated).

RAILWAY_RUN_UID.description: Required: Railway mounts volumes as root, but the Instatic image otherwise runs as non-root bun. Set to 0 so SQLite and media directory creation do not fail with EACCES under /app/storage.
